statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Local Microsoft CloudContent.admx DisableThirdPartySuggestions mapping
links.summary: The local ADMX file maps DisableThirdPartySuggestions to HKCU\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CloudContent with enabledValue 1 and disabledValue 0.

links.title: Local Microsoft CloudContent.adml DisableThirdPartySuggestions help text
links.summary: The local ADML help text says enabling the policy stops Windows Spotlight features such as suggested apps in Start from suggesting apps and content from third-party publishers.

links.title: Local Microsoft CloudContent.admx DisableWindowsSpotlightOnSettings mapping
links.summary: The local ADMX file maps DisableWindowsSpotlightOnSettings to HKCU\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CloudContent with enabledValue 1 and disabledValue 0.

links.title: Local Microsoft CloudContent.adml DisableWindowsSpotlightOnSettings help text
links.summary: The local ADML help text says enabling the policy stops Windows Spotlight suggestions from appearing in the Settings app.

links.title: Local Microsoft CloudContent.admx DisableWindowsSpotlightWindowsWelcomeExperience mapping
links.summary: The local ADMX file maps DisableWindowsSpotlightWindowsWelcomeExperience to HKCU\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CloudContent with enabledValue 1 and disabledValue 0.

links.title: Local Microsoft CloudContent.adml DisableWindowsSpotlightWindowsWelcomeExperience help text
links.summary: The local ADML help text says enabling the policy stops the Windows Welcome Experience from displaying after updates and changes.
